domain.program.name: Proposal Ops
domain.intake.purpose: Calculate proposal fees, lookup a CRM account, summarize the brief, and close the proposal workflow.

artifacts.spec_yaml:
name: proposal-ops
termination: BoundedSession
topology: CyclicTopology
pure: true
preamble: |-
  Program: Proposal Ops. Calculate proposal fees, lookup a CRM account, summarize the brief, and close the proposal workflow.

  This spec was synthesized mechanically by pgas-new.
initial: intake
terminal:
  - complete
features:
  - base
  - runtime_control
  - reactions
channels:
  user_text:
    direction: In
    sync: Async
  system_mode_entry:
    direction: In
    sync: Async
  widget_output:
    direction: Out
    sync: Async
  stage_output:
    direction: Out
    sync: Sync
modes:
  intake:
    vocabulary:
      - begin_work
      - record_user_note
      - session_new
      - session_abort_current
      - session_status
      - session_history
      - session_resume
      - session_help
    channels:
      - user_text
      - system_mode_entry
      - widget_output
    transitions:
      - target: fee_modeling
        guard:
          kind: FieldTruthy
          path: intake.started
  fee_modeling:
    vocabulary:
      - complete_fee_modeling
      - record_user_note
      - session_new
      - session_abort_current
      - session_status
      - session_history
      - session_resume
      - session_help
    channels:
      - user_text
      - widget_output
      - stage_output
    transitions:
      - target: crm_lookup
        guard:
          kind: FieldTruthy
          path: fee_modeling.ready
  crm_lookup:
    vocabulary:
      - complete_crm_lookup
      - record_user_note
      - session_new
      - session_abort_current
      - session_status
      - session_history
      - session_resume
      - session_help
    channels:
      - user_text
      - widget_output
      - stage_output
    transitions:
      - target: brief_summary
        guard:
          kind: FieldTruthy
          path: crm_lookup.ready
  brief_summary:
    vocabulary:
      - complete_brief_summary
      - record_user_note
      - session_new
      - session_abort_current
      - session_status
      - session_history
      - session_resume
      - session_help
    channels:
      - user_text
      - widget_output
    transitions:
      - target: complete
        guard:
          kind: FieldTruthy
          path: brief_summary.done
  complete:
    vocabulary:
      - session_status
      - session_history
      - session_help
    channels:
      - widget_output
    transitions: []
proceed_to:
  begin_work: fee_modeling
  complete_fee_modeling: crm_lookup
  complete_crm_lookup: brief_summary
  complete_brief_summary: complete
projection:
  intake:
    include:
      - inputs.user_text
      - inputs.initial_user_text
      - notebook.entries
      - notebook.pins
      - intake.started
    exclude: []
  complete:
    include:
      - inputs.initial_user_text
      - fee_modeling.ready
      - crm_lookup.ready
      - brief_summary.done
      - fee_modeling.output
      - fee_modeling.result_json
      - fee_modeling.items_json
      - crm_lookup.output
      - crm_lookup.result_json
      - crm_lookup.items_json
      - brief_summary.result_json
      - brief_summary.items_json
      - brief_summary.result
    exclude: []
  fee_modeling:
    include:
      - inputs.user_text
      - inputs.initial_user_text
      - notebook.entries
      - notebook.pins
      - fee_modeling.ready
      - fee_modeling.output
      - fee_modeling.result_json
      - fee_modeling.items_json
    exclude: []
  crm_lookup:
    include:
      - inputs.user_text
      - inputs.initial_user_text
      - notebook.entries
      - notebook.pins
      - crm_lookup.ready
      - fee_modeling.output
      - fee_modeling.result_json
      - fee_modeling.items_json
      - crm_lookup.output
      - crm_lookup.result_json
      - crm_lookup.items_json
    exclude: []
  brief_summary:
    include:
      - inputs.user_text
      - inputs.initial_user_text
      - notebook.entries
      - notebook.pins
      - brief_summary.done
      - fee_modeling.output
      - fee_modeling.result_json
      - fee_modeling.items_json
      - crm_lookup.output
      - crm_lookup.result_json
      - crm_lookup.items_json
      - brief_summary.result_json
      - brief_summary.items_json
      - brief_summary.result
    exclude: []
prompts:
  intake: Capture the initial request for Proposal Ops and start the work.
  complete: Terminal mode after Proposal Ops completion is confirmed.
  fee_modeling: Perform the fee_modeling stage for Proposal Ops.
  crm_lookup: Perform the crm_lookup stage for Proposal Ops.
  brief_summary: |-
    Perform the brief_summary judgment for this generated program. Read the original request stored at inputs.initial_user_text and every prior stage output available in program state, weigh the recorded facts, and produce an explicit assessment with a recommended action. Justify the recommendation from concrete recorded facts and never invent facts that are absent from the request or prior stage outputs.
    Return your reasoning through the stage action's arguments. result_json must be a JSON object containing at least: assessment (string), recommended_action (enum: proceed | revise | block), confidence (enum: low | medium | high), key_findings (string_array; pass the argument as a JSON array string). Additional keys are allowed. items_json must be a JSON array of strings matching: brief_summary:action:<recommended_action>, brief_summary:confidence:<confidence>.
ingestion:
  user_text:
    - inputs.user_text
  system_mode_entry:
    - inputs.mode_entry
action_map:
  begin_work:
    description: Start intake and advance exactly one hop to fee_modeling.
    mutations:
      - op: MSet
        path: intake.started
        value: true
    channel: widget_output
  record_user_note:
    description: Record a notebook note.
    mutations:
      - op: MAppend
        path: notebook.entries
        from_arg: note
    channel: widget_output
  session_new:
    description: Control-plane new session command.
    mutations: []
    channel: widget_output
  session_abort_current:
    description: Control-plane abort current session command.
    mutations: []
    channel: widget_output
  session_status:
    description: Control-plane status command.
    mutations: []
    channel: widget_output
  session_history:
    description: Control-plane history command.
    mutations: []
    channel: widget_output
  session_resume:
    description: Control-plane resume command.
    mutations: []
    channel: widget_output
  session_help:
    description: Control-plane help command.
    mutations: []
    channel: widget_output
  complete_fee_modeling:
    description: Run deterministic pure-compute wrapper for fee_modeling and advance exactly one hop to crm_lookup.
    result_path: fee_modeling.output
    mutations:
      - op: MSet
        path: fee_modeling.ready
        value: true
    channel: stage_output
  complete_crm_lookup:
    description: Run deterministic external-adapter wrapper for crm_lookup and advance exactly one hop to brief_summary.
    result_path: crm_lookup.output
    mutations:
      - op: MSet
        path: crm_lookup.ready
        value: true
    channel: stage_output
  complete_brief_summary:
    description: Record runtime LLM reasoning output for brief_summary and advance exactly one hop to complete.
    arg_descriptions:
      result_json: 'JSON string result for the brief_summary LLM reasoning stage. Must encode a JSON object containing at least: assessment (string), recommended_action (enum: proceed | revise | block), confidence (enum: low | medium | high), key_findings (string_array; pass the argument as a JSON array string). Additional keys are allowed.'
      items_json: 'JSON string array of item strings produced by the brief_summary LLM reasoning stage. Must match the templates: brief_summary:action:<recommended_action>, brief_summary:confidence:<confidence>.'
      assessment: Overall brief_summary assessment.
      recommended_action: 'Recommended next action. One of: proceed | revise | block.'
      confidence: 'Confidence in the assessment. One of: low | medium | high.'
      key_findings: Key findings supporting the assessment. Provide the value as a JSON array string.
    mutations:
      - op: MSet
        path: brief_summary.done
        value: true
      - op: MSet
        path: brief_summary.result_json
        from_arg: result_json
      - op: MSet
        path: brief_summary.items_json
        from_arg: items_json
      - op: MSet
        path: brief_summary.result.assessment
        from_arg: assessment
      - op: MSet
        path: brief_summary.result.recommended_action
        from_arg: recommended_action
      - op: MSet
        path: brief_summary.result.confidence
        from_arg: confidence
      - op: MSet
        path: brief_summary.result.key_findings
        from_arg: key_findings
    channel: widget_output
schema:
  inputs.user_text: string
  inputs.query_result.kind: string
  inputs.query_result.value_json: object
  inputs.query_meta.source_path: string
  inputs.query_meta.source_channel: string
  inputs.query_meta.continuation_round: number
  inputs.query_meta.scope_redirect: string
  inputs.query_meta.message: string
  inputs.mode_entry: object
  inputs.mode_entry.mode: string
  inputs.mode_entry.from_mode: string
  inputs.mode_entry.entry_round: number
  governance.round_counter: number
  notebook.entries: array
  notebook.pins: array
  inputs.initial_user_text: string
  intake.started: boolean
  fee_modeling.ready: boolean
  crm_lookup.ready: boolean
  brief_summary.done: boolean
  fee_modeling.output: object
  fee_modeling.output.result_json: string
  fee_modeling.output.items_json: string
  fee_modeling.output.digest: string
  fee_modeling.result_json: string
  fee_modeling.items_json: string
  crm_lookup.output: object
  crm_lookup.output.result_json: string
  crm_lookup.output.items_json: string
  crm_lookup.output.digest: string
  crm_lookup.result_json: string
  crm_lookup.items_json: string
  crm_lookup.output.adapter_kind: string
  brief_summary.result_json: string
  brief_summary.items_json: string
  brief_summary.result: object
  brief_summary.result.assessment: string
  brief_summary.result.recommended_action: string
  brief_summary.result.confidence: string
  brief_summary.result.key_findings: string
repair_bound: 2
fallback:
  channel: widget_output
  payload:
    ok: false
guidance:
  fee_modeling:
    - Use the synthesized JSON-string scalar fields for structured handler results.
    - 'delegation intake captured for this program: {"crm_lookup":{"service":"crm","adapter":"in-memory mock account lookup"}}.'
  crm_lookup:
    - Use the synthesized JSON-string scalar fields for structured handler results.
    - 'delegation intake captured for this program: {"crm_lookup":{"service":"crm","adapter":"in-memory mock account lookup"}}.'
  brief_summary:
    - Use the synthesized JSON-string scalar fields for structured handler results.
    - 'delegation intake captured for this program: {"crm_lookup":{"service":"crm","adapter":"in-memory mock account lookup"}}.'
    - 'assessment (string): Overall brief_summary assessment.'
    - 'recommended_action (enum, one of: proceed | revise | block): Recommended next action.'
    - 'confidence (enum, one of: low | medium | high): Confidence in the assessment.'
    - 'key_findings (string_array): Key findings supporting the assessment.'
    - 'items_json templates: brief_summary:action:<recommended_action>, brief_summary:confidence:<confidence>.'
    - Populate every core argument; the composite result_json must agree with the per-field arguments.
control_plane:
  version: 1
  session:
    program: proposal-ops
    binding: identity_channel_program
    concurrency:
      policy: single_active
      on_busy: reject_with_status
  free_text:
    control: ask
    bind:
      query: $text
  controls:
    ask:
      title: Ask
      aliases:
        - /ask
      args:
        query:
          type: string
          required: true
          capture: rest
      dispatch:
        - op: create_session
          as: session
          program: proposal-ops
          domain_context:
            query: $args.query
        - op: trigger
          session: $session.id
          channel: user_text
          payload: $args.query
          mode: async
    abort:
      title: Abort run
      aliases:
        - /abort
        - /stop
      availability:
        when: active_session.running
      dispatch:
        - op: abort_session
          session: $active_session.id
      presentation:
        priority: destructive
        confirm: true
    new:
      title: New session
      aliases:
        - /new
        - /reset
        - /restart
      dispatch:
        - op: create_session
          as: session
          program: proposal-ops
      presentation:
        priority: secondary
    history:
      title: Recent sessions
      aliases:
        - /history
        - /recent
      dispatch:
        - op: list_sessions
          as: sessions
      presentation:
        priority: secondary
    status:
      title: Status
      aliases:
        - /status
      availability:
        when: active_session
      dispatch:
        - op: render_session
          session: $active_session.id
          view: status
      presentation:
        priority: contextual
    resume:
      title: Resume
      aliases:
        - /resume
      availability:
        when: active_session
      dispatch:
        - op: send_runtime_control
          session: $active_session.id
          control: resume
      presentation:
        priority: contextual
    help:
      title: Help
      aliases:
        - /help
      dispatch:
        - op: render_help
      presentation:
        priority: secondary
reactions:
  capture_initial_entry_input:
    event: AfterIngestion
    watch:
      - inputs.user_text
    write_scope:
      - inputs.initial_user_text
  mirror_fee_modeling_output:
    event: AfterRound
    write_scope:
      - fee_modeling.result_json
      - fee_modeling.items_json
  mirror_crm_lookup_output:
    event: AfterRound
    write_scope:
      - crm_lookup.result_json
      - crm_lookup.items_json
